description: Product description Spread festive cheer this Christmas with our delightful Elf Hat from Skyte! This charming accessory transforms you into one of Santa's most trusted helpers with its classic red and green felt design. The hat comes complete with adorable attached elf ears and merry jingling bells that create a magical sound with every movement. Made from durable polyester material, this comfortable hat features the endearing text 'Santa's Helper', making it perfect for Christmas parties, festive gatherings, or workplace celebrations. Suitable for both men and women, this versatile costume accessory adds a playful touch to any holiday outfit. Whether you're organising a Christmas event, participating in festive activities, or simply want to embrace the holiday spirit, this elf hat is sure to bring smiles and seasonal joy to all around you. Join Santa's workshop in style with this cheerful and fun holiday headwear! Safety Warning not applicale
